content.json:
## APIM Cost Allocation & Showback Dashboard

This tab splits the **base APIM infrastructure cost** across business units proportionally by usage, then adds **variable per-API costs** based on request volume. Data comes from `ApiManagementGatewayLogs` in Log Analytics, keyed by APIM subscription ID.

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| **APIM SKU** | Deployed SKU (read-only, set at deployment time) |
| **Base Monthly APIM Cost** | Fixed platform cost (SKU, networking, etc.) split proportionally by request share |
| **Variable Cost per 1K Requests** | Usage-based rate applied on top of the base allocation |

> Adjust cost parameters above to model different pricing scenarios. Defaults are set from the deployed SKU via the notebook.

| Component | Formula |
|---|---|
| **Base Cost** | Monthly platform cost for the **{ApimSku}** SKU (see parameter above): **${BaseMonthlyCost}** |
| **Base Cost Share** | `Base Monthly Cost x (BU Requests / Total Requests)` |
| **Variable Cost** | `BU Requests x (Rate per 1K / 1000)` |
| **Total Allocated** | `Base Cost Share + Variable Cost` |

> The cost parameters default to the deployed SKU's retail pricing (set at deployment time via `azure_cost.get_apim_sku_pricing()`). You can override them above to model different scenarios. See the [Azure APIM pricing page](https://azure.microsoft.com/pricing/details/api-management/) for current rates.

content.query:
let baseCost = todouble('{BaseMonthlyCost}');
let perKRate = todouble('{PerRequestRate}');
let logs = ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and ApimSubscriptionId != '';
let totalRequests = toscalar(logs | summarize count());
logs
| summarize RequestCount = count() by ApimSubscriptionId
| extend UsageShare = round(RequestCount * 100.0 / totalRequests, 2)
| extend BaseCostShare = round(baseCost * RequestCount / totalRequests, 2)
| extend VariableCost = round(RequestCount * perKRate / 1000.0, 2)
| extend TotalAllocatedCost = round(BaseCostShare + VariableCost, 2)
| order by TotalAllocatedCost desc
| project
    ['Business Unit'] = ApimSubscriptionId,
    ['Requests'] = RequestCount,
    ['Usage Share (%)'] = UsageShare,
    ['Base Cost ($)'] = baseCost,
    ['Base Cost Share ($)'] = BaseCostShare,
    ['Variable Cost ($)'] = VariableCost,
    ['Total Allocated ($)'] = TotalAllocatedCost
content.title: Cost Allocation by Business Unit (click a row to filter charts below)
Base vs Variable Cost Split by Business Unit

content.query:
let baseCost = todouble('{BaseMonthlyCost}');
let perKRate = todouble('{PerRequestRate}');
let selectedBU = '{SelectedBusinessUnit}';
let logs = ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and ApimSubscriptionId != '';
let filteredLogs = logs
| where selectedBU == '*' or ApimSubscriptionId == selectedBU;
let totalRequests = toscalar(logs | summarize count());
filteredLogs
| summarize RequestCount = count() by ApimSubscriptionId, ApiId
| extend BaseCostShare = round(baseCost * RequestCount / totalRequests, 2)
| extend VariableCost = round(RequestCount * perKRate / 1000.0, 2)
| extend TotalCost = round(BaseCostShare + VariableCost, 2)
| order by TotalCost desc
| project
    ['Business Unit'] = ApimSubscriptionId,
    ['API'] = ApiId,
    ['Requests'] = RequestCount,
    ['Base Share ($)'] = BaseCostShare,
    ['Variable ($)'] = VariableCost,
    ['Total ($)'] = TotalCost
| take 25
content.title: Cost Breakdown by Business Unit & API (Top 25)

content.query:
ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and ApimSubscriptionId != ''
| summarize RequestCount = count() by ApimSubscriptionId
| order by RequestCount desc
| project BusinessUnit = ApimSubscriptionId, RequestCount
content.title: Request Count by Business Unit

content.query:
let apimLogs = ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and ApimSubscriptionId != '';
let totalCount = toscalar(apimLogs | count);
apimLogs
| summarize RequestCount = count() by ApimSubscriptionId
| extend Percentage = round(RequestCount * 100.0 / totalCount, 2)
| order by RequestCount desc
| project BusinessUnit = ApimSubscriptionId, RequestCount, ['Percentage (%)'] = Percentage
content.title: Request Distribution Across Business Units

content.query:
let selectedBU = '{SelectedBusinessUnit}';
ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and ApimSubscriptionId != ''
| where selectedBU == '*' or ApimSubscriptionId == selectedBU
| summarize RequestCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), ApimSubscriptionId
| project TimeGenerated, BusinessUnit = ApimSubscriptionId, RequestCount
content.title: Request Trends Over Time by Business Unit

content.query:
let selectedBU = '{SelectedBusinessUnit}';
ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and ApimSubscriptionId != ''
| where selectedBU == '*' or ApimSubscriptionId == selectedBU
| summarize 
    TotalRequests = count(),
    SuccessRequests = countif(ResponseCode < 400),
    ClientErrors = countif(ResponseCode >= 400 and ResponseCode < 500),
    ServerErrors = countif(ResponseCode >= 500)
    by ApimSubscriptionId
| extend SuccessRate = round(SuccessRequests * 100.0 / TotalRequests, 2)
| extend ErrorRate = round((ClientErrors + ServerErrors) * 100.0 / TotalRequests, 2)
| project 
    BusinessUnit = ApimSubscriptionId, 
    TotalRequests, 
    SuccessRequests, 
    ClientErrors, 
    ServerErrors, 
    ['Success Rate (%)'] = SuccessRate,
    ['Error Rate (%)'] = ErrorRate
| order by TotalRequests desc
content.title: Success & Error Metrics by Business Unit

content.query:
let selectedBU = '{SelectedBusinessUnit}';
ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and ApimSubscriptionId != ''
| where selectedBU == '*' or ApimSubscriptionId == selectedBU
| extend ResponseClass = case(
    ResponseCode >= 200 and ResponseCode < 300, '2xx',
    ResponseCode >= 300 and ResponseCode < 400, '3xx',
    ResponseCode >= 400 and ResponseCode < 500, '4xx',
    ResponseCode >= 500, '5xx',
    'Other')
| summarize RequestCount = count() by ApimSubscriptionId, ResponseClass
| order by ApimSubscriptionId, ResponseClass
| project BusinessUnit = ApimSubscriptionId, ResponseClass, RequestCount
content.title: Response Code Distribution by Business Unit

content.json:
Select a **Business Unit** row in the Cost Allocation table above to see that unit's cost trend over time.

The chart shows daily base cost share and variable cost for the selected business unit. The horizontal line represents the total base monthly cost (${BaseMonthlyCost}) for reference.

content.title: Cost Trend for: {SelectedBusinessUnit}

content.json: > Select a business unit row in the Cost Allocation table to view its cost trend.

parameters.label: App ID Names (JSON)
parameters.name: AppIdNames
parameters.description: Optional JSON mapping of App IDs to friendly names. Example: {"a5846c0e-...":"HR Service","9e6bfb3f-...":"Mobile Gateway"}

content.json:
## APIM Cost Attribution by Caller ID

This tab shows API usage and cost allocation by **Entra ID application** (`appid` claim). Data comes from the `emit-metric` policy's `caller-requests` custom metric in Application Insights.

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| **Monthly Base Cost** | Fixed platform cost split proportionally by request share |
| **App ID Names** | Optional JSON mapping of App IDs to friendly names |

> **Note:** Data typically takes 5-10 minutes to appear after API calls.

content.query:
let appNames = parse_json('{AppIdNames}');
app("__APP_INSIGHTS_NAME__").customMetrics
| where name == 'caller-requests'
| extend CallerId = tostring(customDimensions.CallerId)
| where isnotempty(CallerId)
| summarize RequestCount = sum(value) by CallerId
| extend Caller = iif(isnotempty(tostring(appNames[CallerId])), strcat(tostring(appNames[CallerId]), ' (', CallerId, ')'), CallerId)
| project Caller, RequestCount
| order by RequestCount desc
content.title: Total Requests by Caller ID
content.noDataMessage: No caller-requests metrics found in the selected time range.

content.query:
let appNames = parse_json('{AppIdNames}');
app("__APP_INSIGHTS_NAME__").customMetrics
| where name == 'caller-requests'
| extend CallerId = tostring(customDimensions.CallerId)
| where isnotempty(CallerId)
| summarize RequestCount = sum(value) by CallerId
| extend Caller = iif(isnotempty(tostring(appNames[CallerId])), strcat(tostring(appNames[CallerId]), ' (', CallerId, ')'), CallerId)
| project Caller, RequestCount
| order by RequestCount desc
content.title: Usage Summary
content.noDataMessage: No caller-requests metrics found in the selected time range.

content.json: Proportional cost breakdown based on the **Monthly Base Cost** parameter above. Each caller's share is calculated as their percentage of total requests applied to the base cost.

content.query:
let appNames = parse_json('{AppIdNames}');
let baseCost = {BaseCost};
let metrics = app("__APP_INSIGHTS_NAME__").customMetrics
| where name == 'caller-requests'
| extend CallerId = tostring(customDimensions.CallerId)
| where isnotempty(CallerId);
let totalRequests = toscalar(metrics | summarize sum(value));
metrics
| summarize RequestCount = sum(value) by CallerId
| extend Caller = iif(isnotempty(tostring(appNames[CallerId])), strcat(tostring(appNames[CallerId]), ' (', CallerId, ')'), CallerId)
| extend UsagePercent = round(RequestCount * 100.0 / totalRequests, 2)
| extend AllocatedCost = round(baseCost * RequestCount / totalRequests, 2)
| order by AllocatedCost desc
| project Caller, RequestCount, ['Usage %'] = UsagePercent, ['Allocated Cost ($)'] = AllocatedCost
content.title: Cost Allocation by Caller ID
content.noDataMessage: No caller-requests metrics found in the selected time range.

content.title: Cost Distribution
content.noDataMessage: No caller-requests metrics found in the selected time range.

content.json: Hourly request volume by caller over time. Use this to spot traffic spikes, identify peak usage periods, and detect anomalies by caller.

content.query:
let appNames = parse_json('{AppIdNames}');
app("__APP_INSIGHTS_NAME__").customMetrics
| where name == 'caller-requests'
| extend CallerId = tostring(customDimensions.CallerId)
| where isnotempty(CallerId)
| extend Caller = iif(isnotempty(tostring(appNames[CallerId])), strcat(tostring(appNames[CallerId]), ' (', CallerId, ')'), CallerId)
| summarize Requests = sum(value) by Caller, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Hourly Request Trend by Caller ID
content.noDataMessage: No caller-requests metrics found in the selected time range.

parameters.label: App ID Names (JSON)
parameters.name: AppIdNamesToken
parameters.description: Optional JSON mapping of App IDs to friendly names.

content.json:
## AI Gateway: Token & PTU Consumption per Client

When APIM is used as an **AI Gateway**, built-in model-level metrics (PTU utilization, token counts) do not break down by client. This tab fills that gap using `caller-tokens` custom metrics emitted by the `emit-metric` policy.

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| **Cost per 1K Prompt Tokens** | Rate for input/prompt tokens (from your Azure OpenAI pricing) |
| **Cost per 1K Completion Tokens** | Rate for output/completion tokens |
| **PTU Capacity** | Your provisioned throughput unit capacity in tokens/minute (for utilization %) |

> Rates default to approximate GPT-4o pricing. Adjust to match your model and region.

content.query:
let appNames = parse_json('{AppIdNamesToken}');
app("__APP_INSIGHTS_NAME__").customMetrics
| where name == 'caller-tokens'
| extend CallerId = tostring(customDimensions.CallerId)
| extend TokenType = tostring(customDimensions.TokenType)
| where isnotempty(CallerId) and TokenType != 'total'
| summarize Tokens = sum(value) by CallerId, TokenType
| extend Caller = iif(isnotempty(tostring(appNames[CallerId])), strcat(tostring(appNames[CallerId]), ' (', CallerId, ')'), CallerId)
| project Caller, TokenType, Tokens
| evaluate pivot(TokenType, sum(Tokens))
| project Caller, PromptTokens = column_ifexists('prompt', 0.0), CompletionTokens = column_ifexists('completion', 0.0)
| order by PromptTokens + CompletionTokens desc
content.title: Token Consumption by Client (Prompt vs Completion)
content.noDataMessage: No caller-tokens metrics found. Ensure the token tracking policy is deployed.

content.query:
let appNames = parse_json('{AppIdNamesToken}');
let promptRate = todouble('{PromptTokenRate}');
let completionRate = todouble('{CompletionTokenRate}');
app("__APP_INSIGHTS_NAME__").customMetrics
| where name == 'caller-tokens'
| extend CallerId = tostring(customDimensions.CallerId)
| extend TokenType = tostring(customDimensions.TokenType)
| extend Model = tostring(customDimensions.Model)
| where isnotempty(CallerId)
| summarize Tokens = sum(value), Requests = count() by CallerId, TokenType, Model
| evaluate pivot(TokenType, sum(Tokens))
| extend Caller = iif(isnotempty(tostring(appNames[CallerId])), strcat(tostring(appNames[CallerId]), ' (', CallerId, ')'), CallerId)
| extend PromptTokens = column_ifexists('prompt', 0.0)
| extend CompletionTokens = column_ifexists('completion', 0.0)
| extend TotalTokens = column_ifexists('total', 0.0)
| extend PromptCost = round(PromptTokens * promptRate / 1000.0, 4)
| extend CompletionCost = round(CompletionTokens * completionRate / 1000.0, 4)
| extend TotalCost = round(PromptCost + CompletionCost, 4)
| order by TotalCost desc
| project Caller, Model, PromptTokens, CompletionTokens, TotalTokens, ['Prompt Cost ($)'] = PromptCost, ['Completion Cost ($)'] = CompletionCost, ['Total Cost ($)'] = TotalCost
content.title: Token Cost Allocation by Client & Model

content.query:
let appNames = parse_json('{AppIdNamesToken}');
app("__APP_INSIGHTS_NAME__").customMetrics
| where name == 'caller-tokens'
| extend CallerId = tostring(customDimensions.CallerId)
| extend TokenType = tostring(customDimensions.TokenType)
| where isnotempty(CallerId) and TokenType == 'total'
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(value) by CallerId
| extend Caller = iif(isnotempty(tostring(appNames[CallerId])), strcat(tostring(appNames[CallerId]), ' (', CallerId, ')'), CallerId)
| project Caller, TotalTokens
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Total Token Share by Client

content.query:
let appNames = parse_json('{AppIdNamesToken}');
let promptRate = todouble('{PromptTokenRate}');
let completionRate = todouble('{CompletionTokenRate}');
app("__APP_INSIGHTS_NAME__").customMetrics
| where name == 'caller-tokens'
| extend CallerId = tostring(customDimensions.CallerId)
| extend TokenType = tostring(customDimensions.TokenType)
| where isnotempty(CallerId)
| summarize Tokens = sum(value) by CallerId, TokenType
| evaluate pivot(TokenType, sum(Tokens))
| extend Caller = iif(isnotempty(tostring(appNames[CallerId])), strcat(tostring(appNames[CallerId]), ' (', CallerId, ')'), CallerId)
| extend PromptCost = round(column_ifexists('prompt', 0.0) * promptRate / 1000.0, 4)
| extend CompletionCost = round(column_ifexists('completion', 0.0) * completionRate / 1000.0, 4)
| extend TotalCost = round(PromptCost + CompletionCost, 4)
| order by TotalCost desc
| project Caller, TotalCost
content.title: Estimated Cost Share by Client

content.json:
Token consumption trend over time. Each data point shows the total tokens consumed per client in 1-hour bins. The dashed line represents the configurable PTU capacity threshold.

> **PTU utilization**: If a client's hourly token rate approaches the PTU capacity, consider provisioning more throughput or applying rate limiting.

content.query:
let appNames = parse_json('{AppIdNamesToken}');
app("__APP_INSIGHTS_NAME__").customMetrics
| where name == 'caller-tokens'
| extend CallerId = tostring(customDimensions.CallerId)
| extend TokenType = tostring(customDimensions.TokenType)
| where isnotempty(CallerId) and TokenType == 'total'
| extend Caller = iif(isnotempty(tostring(appNames[CallerId])), strcat(tostring(appNames[CallerId]), ' (', CallerId, ')'), CallerId)
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(value) by Caller, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Hourly Token Consumption by Client (vs PTU Capacity)

content.query:
app("__APP_INSIGHTS_NAME__").customMetrics
| where name == 'caller-tokens'
| extend TokenType = tostring(customDimensions.TokenType)
| where TokenType != 'total'
| summarize Tokens = sum(value) by TokenType, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| evaluate pivot(TokenType, sum(Tokens))
| project timestamp, PromptTokens = column_ifexists('prompt', 0.0), CompletionTokens = column_ifexists('completion', 0.0)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Prompt vs Completion Tokens Over Time (All Clients)

content.json: Per-model breakdown showing which AI models each client is consuming. Useful when multiple models (GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, etc.) are served through the same APIM gateway.

content.query:
let appNames = parse_json('{AppIdNamesToken}');
app("__APP_INSIGHTS_NAME__").customMetrics
| where name == 'caller-tokens'
| extend CallerId = tostring(customDimensions.CallerId)
| extend TokenType = tostring(customDimensions.TokenType)
| extend Model = tostring(customDimensions.Model)
| where isnotempty(CallerId) and TokenType == 'total'
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(value), Requests = dcount(timestamp) by CallerId, Model
| extend Caller = iif(isnotempty(tostring(appNames[CallerId])), strcat(tostring(appNames[CallerId]), ' (', CallerId, ')'), CallerId)
| project Caller, Model, TotalTokens, Requests
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Token Usage by Client & Model
